Hoolheyak:ControlGroup.NAME: Control Group
Hoolheyak:ControlGroup.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Apply 1 Weightless. NL This card is considered a Variable: NL Attack; NL Skill.

Hoolheyak:DistilledTime.NAME: Distilled Time
Hoolheyak:DistilledTime.DESCRIPTION: At the start of your turn, gain !M! random Attack, Skill, or Power potions.

Hoolheyak:Compose.NAME: Compose
Hoolheyak:Compose.DESCRIPTION: Exhaust. NL Until the end of your turn, Variable: NL A card in your hand costs -3; NL All cards in your hand cost -1.
EXTENDED_DESCRIPTION: A card in your hand costs -3.
All cards in your hand cost -1.

Hoolheyak:Refutation.NAME: Refutation
Hoolheyak:Refutation.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Randomly reduce 1 stack of a buff on the target.

Hoolheyak:Headwind.NAME: Headwind
Hoolheyak:Headwind.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage !M! times to a random enemy. NL Whenever this deals damage, apply 1 Lift.

Hoolheyak:WindShear.NAME: Wind Shear
Hoolheyak:WindShear.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Play this card again.

Hoolheyak:Turbulence.NAME: Turbulence
Hoolheyak:Turbulence.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Once per turn, for every 2 Turbulence played this combat, add 1 Turbulence to your hand.

Hoolheyak:Convection.NAME: Convection
Hoolheyak:Convection.DESCRIPTION: Exhaust. NL Deal !D! damage. NL For each Attack played this turn, costs 1 less [E].

Hoolheyak:Archive.NAME: Archive
Hoolheyak:Archive.DESCRIPTION: Exhaust. NL Deal !D! damage. NL Fatal, Variable: NL Choose an extra card of a random color after combat; NL Choose an extra Colorless card after combat.
EXTENDED_DESCRIPTION: Choose an extra card of a random color after combat.
Choose an extra Colorless card after combat.

Hoolheyak:Coercion.NAME: Coercion
Hoolheyak:Coercion.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL If the target is Levitating, knock them down and gain [E].
Hoolheyak:Coercion.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL If the target is Levitating, knock them down and gain [E] [E].

Hoolheyak:MadWords.NAME: Well-Read Ravings
Hoolheyak:MadWords.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage, apply !Hoolheyak:LIFT! Lift. NL Play this card again !M! times.

Hoolheyak:CrossExperiment.NAME: Cross Experiment
Hoolheyak:CrossExperiment.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Gain !B! Block. NL When played, permanently Variable: NL +!M! Damage; NL +!M! Block.

Hoolheyak:Revision.NAME: Revision
Hoolheyak:Revision.DESCRIPTION: Exhaust. NL Exhaust a card in your hand, then add a random card of the same type to your hand.
Hoolheyak:Revision.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Exhaust. NL Exhaust a card in your hand, then add a random card of the same type to your hand. It costs 0 this turn.

Hoolheyak:Foreshadowing.NAME: Foreshadowing
Hoolheyak:Foreshadowing.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL Gain !M! Erudition. NL Gain !Hoolheyak:MEANDER! Meander.

Hoolheyak:Tamper.NAME: Tamper
Hoolheyak:Tamper.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL If this card triggered Meander, play it again.

Hoolheyak:ParameterCorrection.NAME: Parameter Correction
Hoolheyak:ParameterCorrection.DESCRIPTION: Exhaust. NL At the end of your turn, you may Retain up to !M! other cards in your hand. NL Whenever this effect triggers, gain 1 Meander.

Hoolheyak:LiteratureRetrieval.NAME: Literature Retrieval
Hoolheyak:LiteratureRetrieval.DESCRIPTION: Choose 1 of 3 cards of a random color to add to your hand.
Hoolheyak:LiteratureRetrieval.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Choose 1 of 3 cards of a random color to add to your hand. NL It costs 0 this turn.

Hoolheyak:MassOffset.NAME: Mass Offset
Hoolheyak:MassOffset.DESCRIPTION: Apply X Lift to ALL enemies, and gain X Analysis.
Hoolheyak:MassOffset.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Apply X+1 Lift to ALL enemies, and gain X+1 Analysis.

Hoolheyak:FlyUp.NAME: Fly Up!
Hoolheyak:FlyUp.DESCRIPTION: Trigger X times Variable: NL Erudition; NL Meander.
Hoolheyak:FlyUp.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Gain !M! Analysis. NL Trigger X+1 times Variable: NL Erudition; NL Meander.

Hoolheyak:ColdEye.NAME: Cold Eye
Hoolheyak:ColdEye.DESCRIPTION: If the target has taken damage from you this turn, gain !M! Analysis; otherwise, gain !B! Block.

Hoolheyak:InheritedEnd.NAME: Inherited End
Hoolheyak:InheritedEnd.DESCRIPTION: Exhaust. NL This turn, whenever you alternate playing Attacks and Skills, gain [E] and draw 1 card.

Hoolheyak:Stargazing.NAME: Stargazing
Hoolheyak:Stargazing.DESCRIPTION: Look at the top !M! cards of your draw pile. NL Choose up to 3 cards, Variable: NL Discard them; NL Place them at the bottom of your draw pile.
EXTENDED_DESCRIPTION: Place them at the bottom of your draw pile.

Hoolheyak:RecursiveExperiment.NAME: Recursive Experiment
Hoolheyak:RecursiveExperiment.DESCRIPTION: Exhaust. NL Spend 1 [E] to start an experiment. NL Variable: NL End this experiment; NL Play 1 random card and permanently remove it from your deck. After combat, gain an additional card reward of the same type. Then start another experiment.
EXTENDED_DESCRIPTION: Play 1 random card and permanently remove it from your deck. After combat, gain an additional card reward of the same type. Then start another experiment.

Hoolheyak:RedundantExperiment.NAME: Redundant Experiment
Hoolheyak:RedundantExperiment.DESCRIPTION: Choose !M! cards in your hand, Variable: NL This turn, the chosen cards are played when discarded (end of turn discard counts!); NL Discard them, and draw that many cards.
EXTENDED_DESCRIPTION: Discard them, and draw that many cards.

Hoolheyak:BygoneWings.NAME: Bygone Wings
Hoolheyak:BygoneWings.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you play a card of a different color, a random card in your hand costs 1 less [E].

Hoolheyak:InheritedMemories.NAME: Inherited Memories
Hoolheyak:InheritedMemories.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you trigger Meander or Erudition, gain 1 Analysis.
Hoolheyak:InheritedMemories.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Innate. NL Whenever you trigger Meander or Erudition, gain 1 Analysis.

Hoolheyak:ForbiddenKnowledge.NAME: Forbidden Knowledge
Hoolheyak:ForbiddenKnowledge.DESCRIPTION: Variable: NL When Erudition is triggered, draw 1 extra card; NL When Meander is triggered, deal 5 damage to ALL enemies.
Hoolheyak:ForbiddenKnowledge.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Innate. NL Variable: NL When Erudition is triggered, draw 1 extra card; NL When Meander is triggered, deal 5 damage to ALL enemies.
EXTENDED_DESCRIPTION: When Erudition is triggered, draw 1 extra card.
When Meander is triggered, deal 5 damage to ALL enemies.

Hoolheyak:Wingblade.NAME: Wingblade
Hoolheyak:Wingblade.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL If this card triggered Erudition, gain !M! Meander.

Hoolheyak:EntropyIncrease.NAME: Entropy Increase
Hoolheyak:EntropyIncrease.DESCRIPTION: At the start of your turn, add 1 Power card of a random color to your hand.

Hoolheyak:AncientCovenant.NAME: Ancient Covenant
Hoolheyak:AncientCovenant.DESCRIPTION: Variable: NL When Erudition is triggered, gain !M! Strength; NL When Meander is triggered, gain !M! Dexterity.
EXTENDED_DESCRIPTION: When Erudition is triggered, gain !M! Strength.
When Meander is triggered, gain !M! Dexterity.

Hoolheyak:Wardrobe.NAME: Kukulkan's Wardrobe
Hoolheyak:Wardrobe.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you play a card of a different color, add *1 random card of your color to your hand and give it Exhaust.
Hoolheyak:Wardrobe.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Whenever you play a card of a different color, add *1 random card of your color to your hand and give it Exhaust, and it costs *0 this combat.

Hoolheyak:OmniscientHorizon.NAME: Omniscient Horizon
Hoolheyak:OmniscientHorizon.DESCRIPTION: Whenever an enemy Levitates, draw 2 cards and gain [E] [E].

Hoolheyak:SerpentBloodline.NAME: Serpent Bloodline
Hoolheyak:SerpentBloodline.DESCRIPTION: Gain Ritual equal to your Analysis. Then whenever you gain Analysis, gain that much Ritual. NL At the start of each turn, lose [E].

Hoolheyak:DistantLight.NAME: Distant Light
Hoolheyak:DistantLight.DESCRIPTION: At the end of your turn, if Attack damage you dealt this turn is less than 6, trigger Meander and Erudition.

Hoolheyak:CorrectedVariable.NAME: Corrected Variable
Hoolheyak:CorrectedVariable.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you draw a Status card, gain 1 Erudition. NL Whenever you draw a Curse card, gain 1 Meander.

Hoolheyak:Byproduct.NAME: Byproduct
Hoolheyak:Byproduct.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you perform a Variable, gain 1 random card.
Hoolheyak:Byproduct.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Whenever you perform a Variable, gain 1 upgraded random card.

Hoolheyak:ComplementaryExperiment.NAME: Complementary Experiment
Hoolheyak:ComplementaryExperiment.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you perform a Variable, gain !M! Block.

Hoolheyak:KukulkanLegacy.NAME: Kukulkan's Legacy
Hoolheyak:KukulkanLegacy.DESCRIPTION: Increase your Erudition and Meander limits by !M! each. However, damage dealt and Lift applied are doubled.

Hoolheyak:TwinExperiment.NAME: Twin Experiment
Hoolheyak:TwinExperiment.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage 2 times to 2 random enemies. NL If you hit two different enemies, deal !D! damage 2 times to the one with higher HP.

Hoolheyak:KnockInExperiment.NAME: Knock-in Experiment
Hoolheyak:KnockInExperiment.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Variable: NL Spend [E] to heal 3 HP; NL Gain [E].

Hoolheyak:ConjunctionCard.NAME: Conjunction
Hoolheyak:ConjunctionCard.DESCRIPTION: Neutral Aspect NL Unplayable. NL Automatically triggers and Exhausts when drawn. NL Replaces the current field Aspect with Conjunction: All characters deal 50% more damage.

Hoolheyak:QuincunxCard.NAME: Quincunx
Hoolheyak:QuincunxCard.DESCRIPTION: Neutral Aspect NL Unplayable. NL Automatically triggers and Exhausts when drawn. NL Replaces the current field Aspect with Quincunx: Your Skills provide Erudition, Attacks provide Meander.

Hoolheyak:SextileCard.NAME: Sextile
Hoolheyak:SextileCard.DESCRIPTION: Harmonious Aspect NL Unplayable. NL Automatically triggers and Exhausts when drawn. NL Replaces the current field Aspect with Sextile: Your Erudition and Meander trigger requirements are reduced by 2, but you can no longer apply Lift.

Hoolheyak:TrineCard.NAME: Trine
Hoolheyak:TrineCard.DESCRIPTION: Harmonious Aspect NL Unplayable. NL Automatically triggers and Exhausts when drawn. NL Replaces the current field Aspect with Trine: At the start of your turn, gain [E] and draw 2 cards. Your Attacks have Exhaust.

Hoolheyak:SquareCard.NAME: Square
Hoolheyak:SquareCard.DESCRIPTION: Challenging Aspect NL Unplayable. NL Automatically triggers and Exhausts when drawn. NL Replaces the current field Aspect with Square: Whenever you play a card, lose 1 HP and apply 1 Lift to ALL enemies.

Hoolheyak:OppositionCard.NAME: Opposition
Hoolheyak:OppositionCard.DESCRIPTION: Challenging Aspect NL Unplayable. NL Automatically triggers and Exhausts when drawn. NL Replaces the current field Aspect with Opposition: You cannot gain Block. Enemy Gravity is halved.

Hoolheyak:Transit.NAME: Transit
Hoolheyak:Transit.DESCRIPTION: Exhaust. NL Choose and trigger an Aspect.

Hoolheyak:Shockwave.NAME: Shockwave
Hoolheyak:Shockwave.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies and apply !M! Weightless.

Hoolheyak:Separation.NAME: Separation
Hoolheyak:Separation.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Deduct an equal amount from the target's Max HP.

Hoolheyak:ChimeraExperiment.NAME: Chimera Experiment
Hoolheyak:ChimeraExperiment.DESCRIPTION: Play the top X cards of your draw pile. Variable: NL Attacks; NL Skills.
Hoolheyak:ChimeraExperiment.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Play the top X+1 cards of your draw pile. Variable: NL Attacks; NL Skills.

Hoolheyak:ContingencyPlan.NAME: Contingency Plan
Hoolheyak:ContingencyPlan.DESCRIPTION: Gain [E]. NL Whenever Meander is triggered, return this card from your discard pile to your hand.
Hoolheyak:ContingencyPlan.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Gain [E]. NL Whenever Meander or Erudition is triggered, return this card from your discard pile to your hand.

Hoolheyak:Deepthink.NAME: Deepthink
Hoolheyak:Deepthink.DESCRIPTION: Gain !Hoolheyak:ANALYSIS! Analysis. NL Gain !M! Meander and Erudition.

Hoolheyak:BorrowedWeapons.NAME: Borrowed Weapons
Hoolheyak:BorrowedWeapons.DESCRIPTION: Exhaust. NL Deal !D! damage. NL Add 1 random Attack of a different color to your hand.

Hoolheyak:AugmentationExperiment.NAME: Augmentation Experiment
Hoolheyak:AugmentationExperiment.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Variable: NL Gain !M! Analysis; NL Add a copy of this card to your hand and gain !Hoolheyak:ANALYSIS! Analysis.
EXTENDED_DESCRIPTION: Add a copy of this card to your hand and gain 3 Analysis

Hoolheyak:ApoptosisExperiment.NAME: Apoptosis Experiment
Hoolheyak:ApoptosisExperiment.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Apply to target, Variable: NL !M! Lift; NL !Hoolheyak:DECONSTRUCTION! Deconstruction.

Hoolheyak:ControlExperiment.NAME: Control Experiment
Hoolheyak:ControlExperiment.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Variable: NL Gain !M! Analysis; NL Apply !M! Weightless.

Hoolheyak:MutagenesisExperiment.NAME: Mutagenesis Experiment
Hoolheyak:MutagenesisExperiment.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Apply to target, Variable: NL !M! Weak; NL !M! Vulnerable.

Hoolheyak:TransitionalFlow.NAME: Transitional Flow
Hoolheyak:TransitionalFlow.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. Play this card an additional time.

Hoolheyak:Wake.NAME: Wake
Hoolheyak:Wake.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL Gain !M! Analysis. NL If the last card you played was a Skill, play this card an additional time.

Hoolheyak:UniversalMapping.NAME: Universal Mapping
Hoolheyak:UniversalMapping.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. Randomly play !M! Rare Attacks of different colors.

Hoolheyak:Divergence.NAME: Divergence
Hoolheyak:Divergence.DESCRIPTION: Exhaust. NL Gain !B! Block. NL Consume all Lift from the target, gain !M! additional Block for each stack consumed.

Hoolheyak:Convergence.NAME: Convergence
Hoolheyak:Convergence.DESCRIPTION: Exhaust. NL Gain !B! Block. NL Gain additional Block equal to the sum of ALL enemies' Gravity (Max !M!).

Hoolheyak:CrossSearch.NAME: Cross Search
Hoolheyak:CrossSearch.DESCRIPTION: Draw !M! cards, discard 1 card. NL If you discard an Attack, gain 1 Erudition; NL If you discard a Skill, gain 1 Meander.

Hoolheyak:FactorialExperiment.NAME: Factorial Experiment
Hoolheyak:FactorialExperiment.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Variable: NL Trigger a random Variable effect for (most) Variable cards in your hand; NL Add 3 random Variable cards to your hand, they cost *0 this turn.
EXTENDED_DESCRIPTION: Trigger a random Variable effect for (most) Variable cards in your hand
Add 3 random Variable cards to your hand, they cost *0 this turn

Hoolheyak:DiffNormal.NAME: Standard Evaluation
Hoolheyak:DiffNormal.DESCRIPTION: Standard gameplay experience. NL No special modifiers.

Hoolheyak:DiffHard.NAME: In-depth Analysis
Hoolheyak:DiffHard.DESCRIPTION: A challenging experience. NL Erudition stack limit increased by *1. NL Some card values or effects are adjusted.

Hoolheyak:DiffEasy.NAME: Preliminary Investigation
Hoolheyak:DiffEasy.DESCRIPTION: A difficulty suited for learning the mechanics. NL Meander stack limit decreased by *1. NL Some card values or effects are adjusted.

Hoolheyak:PreUniverse.NAME: Just Borrowing
Hoolheyak:PreUniverse.DESCRIPTION: Bring chaos to your starting deck! NL Start with *Prismatic *Shard and *Cocktail *Shaker.

Hoolheyak:PreVariable.NAME: Choices, Choices
Hoolheyak:PreVariable.DESCRIPTION: Fill your starting deck with *Experiment cards! NL Start with *Star *Map *Projection.

Hoolheyak:PrePhase.NAME: Starry Night
Hoolheyak:PrePhase.DESCRIPTION: Celestial phenomenons become chaotic! NL Start with *Frantic *Sundial.
